subcodes.first_line: O essence of the love of God! The answer to your letter was sent, and now too, through His transcendent grace, this leaf [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوهر حب الله جواب مکتوب شما ارسال شد و حال نیز محض رافت کبری این ورقه که
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @service to others; to the Cause of God
